hooks.command: bash -c 'O="$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "Unable to simultaneously satisfy constraints" && echo "Tip: Auto Layout conflict — load ax-uikit"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "Actor-isolated|Sendable|data race|@MainActor" && echo "Tip: Concurrency issue — load ax-concurrency"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "no such column|FOREIGN KEY constraint|migration" && echo "Tip: Database migration issue — load ax-grdb or ax-swiftdata"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "retain cycle|memory leak|deinit.*never called" && echo "Tip: Memory issue — load ax-performance"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "CKError|CKRecord.*error|ubiquitous.*error|iCloud Drive|NSFileCoordinator" && echo "Tip: Cloud sync issue — load ax-cloud-storage"; echo "$O" | grep -qE "error:.*module.*not found|linker command failed" && echo "Tip: Build issue — /axiom:fix-build"; exit 0'
bash -c 'if [[ "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" == *.swift ]] && command -v swiftformat &>/dev/null; then swiftformat "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" --quiet || true; fi; exit 0'
